plain.en: O God, who joined the apostolic zeal of a pastor to the way of life of a monk in Blessed Cyprian Michael; grant us, by his intercession, that persevering in prayer, we may seek untiringly the coming of your kingdom. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: O God, who joined the apostolic zeal of a pastor
to the way of life of a monk in Blessed Cyprian Michael;
grant us, by his intercession, that persevering in prayer,
we may seek untiringly the coming of your kingdom.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.

plain.en: Receive, O Lord, we pray, the offerings placed on your altar in commemoration of blessed Cyprian Michael, so that as you brought him glory you may, through these sacred mysteries, grant to us your pardon. Through Christ our Lord.

en.text: Receive, O Lord, we pray,
the offerings placed on your altar
in commemoration of blessed Cyprian Michael,
so that as you brought him glory
you may, through these sacred mysteries,
grant to us your pardon.
Through Christ our Lord.

plain.en: May partaking at the heavenly table, almighty God, confirm and increase strength from on high in all who celebrate the feast day of blessed Cyprian Michael, that we may preserve in integrity the gift of faith and walk in the path of salvation you trace for us. Through Christ our Lord. Amen.

en.text: May partaking at the heavenly table, almighty God,
confirm and increase strength from on high
in all who celebrate the feast day of blessed Cyprian Michael,
that we may preserve in integrity the gift of faith
and walk in the path of salvation you trace for us.
Through Christ our Lord. Amen.
